subcodes.first_line: The Pen hath been forbidden to mention the mysteries of pre-existence, and the doors of ingress and egress have been shut before Our faces, therefore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد منع القلم عن ذکر اسرار القدم و سدت علی وجوهنا ابواب الدخول و الخروج لذا
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality
